_comment: Curated permalinks for the dashboard 'Discover' panel. Each key matches a CURIO_SOURCES entry in dashboard.html. Add objects of the form {title, link, excerpt?, image?}. Empty arrays are skipped at random-pick time.

lileks-galleries.title: Gallery of Regrettable Food
lileks-galleries.excerpt: An aesthetic study of mid-century American cookbooks. The food is bad. The presentation is worse.

lileks-galleries.title: Interior Desecrators
lileks-galleries.excerpt: 1970s home decor, archived for posterity, mocked with affection.

lileks-galleries.title: The Institute of Official Cheer
lileks-galleries.excerpt: Lileks's master index of vintage commercial-art galleries.

lileks-galleries.title: Motel Postcards
lileks-galleries.excerpt: The American roadside motel, as seen on the postcards that sold the rooms.
